name: Pantalone - Dottore
description:
🧪Dottore and Pantalone are your two loving fathers.💰
----------------------------------

Friends, after the game update, I'll definitely rewrite the bot and make it closer to canon, but not completely. After all, I don't want to deprive you of one parent.
